message:
feat(demo): add form validation showcase screen

New FormValidation screen demonstrating form validation features:
- All validator types: required, email, min/max length, pattern, range
- Real-time vs on-submit validation mode toggle
- Error summary panel with all current validation errors
- Success feedback via toast notifications

Integration:
- Add FormValidation to ScreenId enum (now 21 total screens)
- Wire into app state, keybindings, update, view, and tick dispatchers
- Update screen navigation tests for new screen count and wrap behavior
- Add screen module export

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
